ast.name: appendText
ast.source: For the supported css named colors, please refer to:
ast.target: 有关支持的 CSS 命名颜色，请参阅：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Glob patterns (e.g., * for wildcard) are supported.
ast.target: 支持 Glob 模式（例如，* 代表通配符）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: 1. "*" : Default value to display all paths.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: 2. "A-directory-name/" : Displays all content within the specified directory. You can enter multiple directories, one per line.
ast.target: 2. \"A-directory-name/\"：显示指定目录内的所有内容。您可以输入多个目录，每行一个。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: 3. "A-name-keyword" :Displays all content containing the specified keyword. You can enter multiple keywords, one per line.
ast.target: 3. \"A-name-keyword\"：显示包含指定关键字的所有内容。您可以输入多个关键字，每行一个。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: 4. "#hide-tag/" : Hides all sub-tags of the root tag: "#hide-tag/", but not for root tag itself.
ast.target: 4. \"#hide-tag/\"：隐藏根标签 \"#hide-tag/\" 的所有子标签，但不包括根标签本身。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 启用后，点击标签将基于该标签生成内容报告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically navigate and highlight the current file in the file explorer when opened.
ast.target: 打开时，在文件资源管理器中自动导航并高亮显示当前文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds an anchor at the end of paragraphs in your notes matching your tag query. This modification enables precise backlinking to specific paragraphs.
ast.target: 在笔记中与标签查询匹配的段落末尾添加锚点。此修改可实现对特定段落的精确反向链接。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
ngraph.graph: Starting from version 0.14 `uniqueLinkId` is deprecated.
Use `multigraph` option instead
ast.target: ngraph.graph：从版本 0.14 起，`uniqueLinkId` 已弃用。\n请改用 `multigraph` 选项\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Note: there is also change in default behavior: From now on each graph
is considered to be not a multigraph by default (each edge is unique).
ast.target: 注意：默认行为也有所变更：从现在起，每个图\n默认被视为非多重图（每条边都是唯一的）。
